entry.title: Re: Message No. KT299
entry.content: I'm not able to change chart of Account INT because it is greyed out.

entry.title: Re: Message No. KT299
entry.content: I'm not able to change Company Code INT because it is greyed out

entry.title: Re: Successfactor Workflow Groups reports or import
entry.content:
@Mrapolu06 - I don't recall the KB that led me to this solution, but ended up creating a Story report on entity "Dynamic Group" (linked in entity Basic User Information), and filtered on Group Subtype Equal to ectworkflow.

See attached images.

Hope this helps!

entry.title: Using IPS to create a predictable password for non-SSO Users in IAS for SF?
entry.content:
Hello, I have a question about possibilities of using IPS to set large amounts of default passwords on an ongoing basis.

With many companies starting the mandatory migration to IAS/IPS for SuccessFactors, we are finding more that have large populations of "PWD" Password users with no real emails that still need to access the system. 

With CIS in place the mechanism to update passwords has moved to IAS and not in SF anymore where the old mass import tools are no longer applicable for an HR Admin to use.

If we need to update more than 50, 100, 300 passwords, how is this achievable realistically? IPS method for setting default passwords for all newly synced users would be the ideal process for the business over an outside API call or file import done every so often but concessions can be made. 

It seems file-based export of existing synced users and re-import CSV with an initial password I setup in a column does not work (anymore?). This was the "old" method available in SF and used by many that would now be gone switching to IAS. You could control the predictable password this way and pass them out per employee. 

We have reviewed the documentation and seems the most promising as it doesn't need an HR Admin to manually interfere and only follow a business process with rules you set in the transformations, but the rules are limited currently:
Set Up Default Passwords Using Transformations | SAP Help Portal

The last portion of this document is incomplete/inaccurate. It gives a title of "combining" fields and then only gives one field example. 

The other examples for a "predictable password" might work for some companies, to set it to their Employee ID but that could be risky to onboard 100s of password users and tell them their password is their Employee ID. At the moment our only consideration is trying to combine 2 of the fields and concat into their password field like FirstName+LastName or more fields, or something unique to the employee as possible, but even this does not completely pass security standards.

 

Is this currently the best or only option for automating the process for bringing in Password users? Whatever method we choose, the HR Admins/business still has to communicate to the user how to login, with what user, what password and build their job aids. 

The note 3001615 - How to mass update user password in Identity Authentication, seems incomplete as it says to use one API and then mentions it is deprecated and to explore the business hub to build your own API call from Postman. This is not exactly something I can hand an HR Admin as a replacement for what they could previously do in SF. 


Thanks for any input I appreciate all opinions on this discussion.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 - Weiterführung nach Testphase & ABAP-Entwicklung
entry.content: Hello, seems the license is for public cloud, but you were trying to use private version.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 - Weiterführung nach Testphase & ABAP-Entwicklung
entry.content: For background, we are a small startup developing third-party applications for SAP. Therefore, we need ABAP, test data/transactional data, and an RFC-enabled server. Not a productive server. The "SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS02, Fully-Activated Appliance" was perfect for us. Which license do we need as a partner to purchase the subscription?

Steve

Thanks for the Reference, I already tried the tutorial but still I cannot deactivate plant specific material Ledger. It says in the system that it still contain relevant data for those valuation areas, and we need to reset it on OBR1 (Reset Transaction Data for Company Code and Controlling Area) which I dont want to use, because I only wanted to delete/deactivate the ML on plant specific not for the whole company code. Thanks 

Fajar KF

entry.title: How to change the company log displayed in SAP Business ByDesign?
entry.content:
Dear All,

 

We have changed the company name so that it is necessary to change the company logo show in SAP Business ByDesign. Could anyone guide us how to change the logo?

 

Best Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change the company log displayed in SAP Busine...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

Please following the below steps:

  1. Logon in tenant and navigate to the home page.
  2. Open the Key User Settings.
  3. Start Adaptation mode.
  4. Right click on the UI Element Background Design and use Change Company Logo.
  5. Then you can upload a new logo.
  6. After change, save and publish the change.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support,

Cariford

entry.title: Re: Customizable/ Custom Fields 01-15
entry.content:
Hello @workhumaned ,

Basically custom fields 1 to 15 are used for Employee profile information. Usually these fields are mapped to Employee central fields of HRIS elements through the hris sync mappings.

You can view the hris sync mappings in the manage business configuration pretty easily to see all the mappings of currently used custom fields 1 to 15 in your instance. 

https://me.sap.com/notes/2510447/E

To be honest you don't need these custom fields for First name, last name etc as these are available directly available through hard coded mappings.

Check out these KBA's https://me.sap.com/notes/2512669 , https://me.sap.com/notes/2172427. https://me.sap.com/notes/2363922

Hope this helps! Good luck.

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Does the partner edge indicate when a workbook was last updated for all SF modules?
entry.content:
Hi,

How do we track updated workbook from SAP? Does the Partner Edge indicate when a workbook was last updated? It appears that it does not, as no time and date are mentioned against the implementation workbook. There is no date in the workbook, making it difficult to track updates on the latest version.

Additionally, Is there a way to view the list of available workbooks in SAP SuccessFactors for all modules at one page to review?

Thanks

We only can access the old Replication Service card where  we only have SAP HANA options. We cannot see S/4HANA options. We are on 2024.40.16 (QRC 4/2024)

Is it based on the remote sources ? or system exposed in the cloud connector ?

EDIT : just find it ! it is under the overview tab of the instance 🙂

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
I have done some more testing and notice this behaviour, i assume it might be linked to the decommissioning of system variables in the release notes, but not sure.

Prior to the release - i have created additional UUID fields in my files to support filtering conditions.  This worked when i filtered on UUID fields - this allowed my to filter as it seemed like Build Apps expected to filter on a UUIDs - so i created additional fields as UUIDs. This worked.


After the release:  Filtering now works on only the non-UUID fields the and the System UUID field, but not UUID fields that i have generated.  I also note that when i set up the additional UUID field in the DB i didnt mark it as required, so i notice there is a difference between the system UUID field and the additional UUIDs that i created. 

I can see that the release has caused a change in system behaviour, im not sure if that is by design with the decommissioning of the system variables, or if there has been an unintended impact.  I might need to re-design some of the back-end to get it working i think. 

Steve

entry.title: Re: Test Plan Execution Stuck at "Enter Application&...

entry.title: Material number field is greyed out when Item Category = L in PO (Order Type: ZL)
entry.content:
I am currently working on a subcontract Purchase Order (PO) with Order Type 'ZL' and encountered an issue when setting the Item Category to 'L'. The material number field becomes greyed out and the material number is not displayed.

I have two clients: On one client, I face this issue where the material number doesn't appear when Item Category is set to 'L'. However, on the other client, the material number is displayed as expected.

 

Could you please provide insights into why this discrepancy exists and how to resolve it?

The screenshots for the client where this issue occurs are attached below:

1. Screenshot where Item Category is set to 'L' and the material number field is greyed out.

  2. Screenshot where Item Category 'L' is removed and the material number appears.

 

  

 

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Angela

entry.title: Service Call Scheduling via SDK

https://help.sap.com/doc/addd48d2bec84621b6bddf9d81a0b701/10.0/en-US/SDKHelp/SAPbobsCOM~ServiceCallSchedulings_members.html

 

Regards,

Nick

entry.title: Re: QueryFailedError - Since Build Apps change 25th Feb
entry.content:
@Dan_Wroblewski , Hi Dan, just confirming a change in the Build Apps behaviour since the last release.  I just want to confirm if it is intentional or might be rolled back before i change my application.

The key change is that build apps is no longer able to filter on UUIDs that have been created over and above the system generated UUID.  Prior to the change I generated UUIDs for filtering of cloud visual function files, After the release the only fields that work via conditional filtering are the System generated UUID "ID" field, text and number fields.  It seems like the behaviour has switched from wanting a UUID to filter on, to now no longer supporting a UUID and enabling text and number fields instead.   I am hesitant to restructure my app to avoid UUIDs if this change will be rolled back. Appreciate any guidance.  Looks like its linked to yesterdays release.  I also tested creating a UUID and marked it as required (to mimic the system UUID) but this also fails.

Steve

entry.title: Re: One absence -> two wage types
entry.content: Hi Do you have an answer? If so, can share your knowledge on this scenario here.

entry.title: Re: Understanding SAP BODS
entry.content:
Hi Community,

" Metadata Reporting
It contains all the metadata about a repository and can be used for reporting on the metadata available, like reporting on the objects created, child-parent hierarchy etc. There is a complete set of tables and views which can be accessed via SQL commands or choosing metadata reporting in admin console. "

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Creating a donut chart with 2 measures or ( in altern...
entry.content:
Hi @egil63 ,

In a pie chart, it is not possible to display two measures at the same time.

However, if you want to use two measures for the same dimension, you can achieve this by creating a Measure Input Control.

This allows you to select multiple measures dynamically.

Steps:

  1. Add a Measure Input Control for both measures as shown below.

 

 

2.Select Measures as per your requirement

 

3. After click on ok you will find new dropdown for measures will appear on screen

As shown below

 

4.You can select measure value as per your requirement, here are final output.

 

If the goal is comparison, consider using a stacked bar or column chart.

Kindly like/accept if you find it useful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM vs SAP Solution Manager
entry.content: Thanks for the information! Excellent blog! I have a question... How will incidents and the entire IT Service Management part be managed now?

entry.title: Re: parameter 'args' is not of type array UI5 issue
entry.content:
most likely you are not using ResourceBundle's getText method correctly- https://ui5.sap.com/#/api/module:sap/base/i18n/ResourceBundle%23methods/getText

check if you are passing parameters {0} in the i18n files as an array in the getText method. For eg: if i18n file has a field like so:

appTitle=App number {0}

and through code you are calling: 

this.getModel("i18n").getResourceBundle().getText("appTitle", ["one"]); // displays 'App number one'

 you are most likely not passing `one` in the array but just as a string so the console log is complaining about that.

entry.title: How to view the uploaded document in DMS (Integration option or Application option)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to upload the documents to Document Management Service's Internal storage.

As I checked in some blogs, to do so

I will need to use one of the following.

1. Integration option + Repository option 

2. Application option + Repository option 

And my current plan is to use No. 1 Integration option + Repository option 

 

And I want to view the uploaded documents directly in the DMS UI also without retrieving the data with API.

So, my concern is that

Is Integration option + Repository option only support to upload and retrieve the document in background only (using API) or can view the uploaded documents in the UI directly?

(or) To be able to view the uploaded documents in UI directly, I will need to use Application option + Repository option?

 

Could you please give me some advice?

 

Thanks,

Aye Chan

entry.title: Re: Assciation With An External Service Entity Not Working
entry.content:
Have a look at the documentation here: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/using-services#integrate-and-extend.

You'll need to connect to App A to send the query, get the results, and then mash it up with the local data.

entry.title: SAC Advance Planning - Account Dimension Calculation
entry.content:
Hey all, 

Can anyone help me with getting the calculated North America Revenue to appear in Calculated Gross Sales for the Forecast Version?

The issue I’m facing:

When I use a simple IF statement on Units, the values appear correctly.
However, when I apply a LOOKUP formula and then use an IF statement, the values disappear.
Even if I try to directly display the Stored Price (which is fetched using LOOKUP), the values do not show up.

DRV0050 = Stored Price
DRV0020 = Units

H111100 = Gross Sales 

DRV0055 Lookup Price (NA) = LOOKUP([DRV0050] ,[d/ENTITY]="#" )
- Since price for each product for all US regions stored under entity #
DRV0060 Revenue (NA) = [DRV0020]*[DRV0055]

IF([d/VERSION].[p/CATEGORY]="Actuals" ,[H111100] ,
IF([d/ENTITY].[p/ENTITY_H1L2]="United States" ,[DRV0060] ,[DRV0080]))

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Restrict pay statement access
entry.content:
Hi,

Normally pay statement on EC is visible when payroll is completed in ECP. This happens via payroll mashup config. 

If you want to restrict pay stub to not visible, you may do so via preparing another security profile for inactive or term employees. Hope this helps.

Ashish

entry.title: Re: SAP analytics cloud upload job starter not appearing in story editor

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: SAP analytics cloud upload job starter not appearing in story editor
entry.content:
@Eliram_Lugassi , The upload job is configured once and then used through the starter many times. Some times the upload job configured gets corrupt and not show up in the starter. You could just create a new upload job and re assign it to the starter. This looks like a bug and you can raise an incident to understand why the upload job got corrupt and removed from the upload strater.

Nikhil

entry.title: Joule Extensibility POC for SAP Learning
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
We're considering a proof of concept that involves utilizing the Joule Extensibility feature in relation to the SAP Learning platform (Learn SAP skills | SAP Learning). The idea is to implement a chatbot that enhances user experience by offering improved recommendations and roadmaps based on their search queries. I'm curious about the feasibility of this concept, given that Joule can currently be integrated only with SAP Line of Business products. Is it possible for us to proceed with this use case?

entry.title: Re: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAc...
entry.content:
@PS_1978 

I do not think you need for each. Also using variables will only work in case of a single employee as variables are additive and when you run for more employees it will add values of 2 employees in those variables. i.e. variables do not get cleared when next employee records comes.

Also there is no data statement in your code so not sure how is this Advanced Formula posting values.

entry.title: Re: Compensation Statement integration with FileNet using...
entry.content:
Hi @xavierlegarrec

Compensation statements, generated and accessible within the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central under Compensation portlet, are available for all employees enrolled in a compensation plan. We want to transfer these statements from SAP SuccessFactors to FileNet using SAP Cloud Platform Integration.

We are currently unable to identify the backend entity associated with the compensation statements within SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC). Could you kindly provide guidance on how to fetch the compensation statements from SAP SuccessFactors EC. Could you kindly advise if there is any workaround solution to facilitate the integration from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central (EC) to FileNet?

Thanks & Best Regards,
Pavan

entry.title: Re: Enabling WEBGUI Firefighter in SAP GRC
entry.content:
@Srinivas_Banda the functionality is already enhanced and available. Please check Note 3515740 which describe the scope, availability and the limitation of how Fiori related app usage can be collected.

Br, Mate

entry.title: Re: Implementing FIFO Tracking in SAP DM
entry.content:
Hello,
 The physical process is as follows: In the steel industry, during bar production, a certain number of bars (e.g., 50) are bundled together to form a single package. To enable end-to-end traceability, it is necessary to track which billet was used in each package. At this point, the "Billet" comes into play as a semi-finished product used to manufacture the final product, which is the bar package. Each billet has a unique identifier called "BilletID" and a specific weight.

  At the beginning of the production line, BilletIDs are arranged sequentially, and their order is known. Therefore, when a bar package is formed and its weight is determined, we can theoretically track which billets contributed to that package by considering the sequence of billets. What I aim to do here is to treat the arranged BilletIDs as a FIFO system and store the origin BilletID as part of the customData for each produced package.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Salary % in Advance Formulas Step in DataAc...
entry.content: Looking at your data, if start date and end date are also dimensions, Just check using datediff between time and start date or end date to identify if employee is terminated or joined within same month. Then use DAYINMONTH and DAY to get the 2 values and get the ratio. Also check if you can use DATERATIO syntax as you have 2 dates in your data.

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally
entry.content:
session = requests.Session()

I created a session and called all requests: user token, csrf and others in this session

response = session.post(url=odata_url, headers=headers, data=json.dumps(new_record))

entry.title: Integration Center - DynamicGroupDefinition - No Data
entry.content:
Hello,

in Platform Feature Settings I have enabled the flag 'Enable Dynamic Group Definition Report' and executed OData API Metadata Refresh.

I am trying to create a report using Integration Center and using the DynamicGroupDefinition - have not done anything fancy in the report, just selected all the fields and getting a 'No Data' in the 'Configure Fields'?

I am assigned within 'Manage Role-Based Permission Access' and I have added myself to the API role (I also have the Super Admin role).

I executed the same steps for another client and I was able to see the details of the Permission Groups - what am I missing? 

Thanks in advance for any help you can provide,

Kind regards,

Cristiana

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
entry.content:
My problem has been solved and I'll share my solution below. If your problem's screenshot is as follows, the reason for this problem is that there's something wrong with the configuration of the default web browser:

 

Solution: 

open your eclipse-->Window-->Preferences-->Web Browser-->select Chrome-->Apply

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Integration & Exception Monitoring aler...
entry.content:
We also found out that these delivered roles don't match with the roles of business users, here mentioned as L1/L2 support roles.
Therefore I already raised a ticket in the "Customer Influence" board.
https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/334418

Feel free to vote for it. (Please)

Best regards,
Dirk

entry.title: Re: AGING REPORT IN CRYSTAL REPORT
entry.content:
To connect your Aging PLD report to Crystal Reports, you'll need to identify the correct table and fields to use as parameters. Since you're getting a "Field Unknown" error, let's troubleshoot together:

# Step 1: Verify the Database Connection
Ensure that your Crystal Reports is connected to the correct database and schema.

# Step 2: Identify the Correct Table
Check your database schema to find the table that stores the Aging PLD data. Common table names might include:

- `Aging_PLD`
- `PLD_Aging`
- `Accounts_Payable_Aging`
- `Aging_Report`

Verify the table name and its fields.

# Step 3: Map Fields to Parameters
In Crystal Reports, go to the "Database Expert" and select the table you identified. Then:

1. Click on the "Parameters" tab.
2. Create a new parameter by clicking the "New" button.
3. Select the field from the table that corresponds to the parameter you want to use (e.g., `Date`, `Customer_ID`, etc.).
4. Map the field to the parameter.

Repeat this process for each parameter you need.

# Step 4: Update the Report
After creating the parameters, update your report to use these parameters. You can do this by:

1. Going to the "Report" menu.
2. Selecting "Report Options".
3. Checking the "Use Parameters" box.

Save and refresh your report.

# Troubleshooting Tips
If you're still encountering issues:

- Verify that the table and fields exist in the database.
- Check the database connection and schema.
- Ensure that the parameter fields are correctly mapped.
- Try using a different table or field to see if the issue persists.

If none of these steps resolve the issue, please provide more details about your report, database, and error message, and I'll do my best to assist you further.

entry.title: Re: Conditional formula to loop through a field and count...
entry.content:
Your formula is close, but there are a few issues:

# Issues with the current formula:
1. The `total` variable is not being reset correctly.
2. The `recNo` variable is not necessary.
3. The formula is not correctly counting the replicates.

# Revised Formula:
Create a new formula `ctNotXRep`:

```
WhilePrintingRecords;
NumberVar total := 0;

if {F9Results.STATUS} <> 'X' then
total := total + 1;

total;
```

This formula initializes the `total` variable to 0 and increments it by 1 for each record where the status is not 'X'.

# Summarizing the Count:
To get the total count of replicates, create another formula `sumNotXrep` and place it in the Report Footer:

```
WhilePrintingRecords;
NumberVar total := Sum({@ctNotXRep});
total;
```

This formula uses the `Sum` function to calculate the total count of replicates.

# Suppressing the Normal Row or Crosstab:
To suppress the normal row or crosstab based on the count, create a new formula `suppress`:

```
WhilePrintingRecords;
NumberVar total := {@sumNotXrep};

if total = 1 then
true // suppress crosstab
else
false; // suppress normal row
```

Place this formula in the "Suppress" property of the normal row and crosstab sections.

This should give you the desired output. Let me know if you have any further questions or issues!

entry.title: Instance Refresh from SF Prod to Test- IPSADMIN admin not found
entry.content:
Hello Everyone-

One small question in Instance Refresh-- I am doing a copy from Prod- Test systems and in Both systems SSO through IAS is enabled.
ASs per KBA- https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/E/2954491
when both systems have IAS enabled, WE need to reset same password for IPSADMIN
However in SF Prod system i dont see a IPSADMIN user,.
Please let me know as how can i solve this problem. ?
If i dont reset the same password for IPSADSMIN in SF Test & Prod will there be any impact?

entry.title: Re: Creating a donut chart with 2 measures or ( in altern...
entry.content:
Hi ,

Ideally the donut chart considers only one measure. ( quantity or revenue).   But there are workarounds you can do to accomplish this.

workaround 1 : Use separate donut charts with linked selections

a. create two separate donut charts:

      1. quantity by category

      2. Revenue by category

      3. use linked analysis - so that selecting category in one chart highlights the corresponding section in             the other.

Hope this helps.

Thanks with regards

Giri

SAP - PSCC Team

We have a foreign currency GL bal 0 but with a local currency amount value. Please advise what are the options if we also wish to clear away the local currency amount value. Tks.

any instructions will be helpful.

Regards,

Manthana

entry.title: Re: Script to extract measure values and loop through the...
entry.content:
Hi ,

consider the below example and sample code:

Example :
Your table is named Table_1.
Your measure is in column index 0 (since there's only one measure).
Your condition is, for example, checking if any value exceeds 1000.


Ref. code :

let ds = Table_1.getDataSource();


ds.getData({
includeDimensions: false,
includeMeasures: true
}).then(function(data) {

let measureValues = [];

for (let i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
let measureValue = data[i][0]; // First column contains the measure value
measureValues.push(measureValue);
}

 

let alertTriggered = false;
for (let i = 0; i < measureValues.length; i++) {
if (measureValues[i] > 1000) { // Your condition
alertTriggered = true;
break; // Exit loop on first match
}
}


if (alertTriggered) {
Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Error, "Warning: Some values exceed the limit!");
}
});

 

Hope this helps,

Thank you!

Giri

SAP - PSCC

entry.title: Amazing Event SAP Chota Talks -Hyderabad
entry.content:
I am had a privilege of sharing insights on Integrated scenarios of AI in #SAPBRIM as a speaker and truly inspiring to exchange knowledge with engaging and interactive audience.

SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 (Q1) was propelled with SAP Business AI discussions, Panel discussions and speaker sessions.

Panel Discussion on "Jobs in Age of AI" each and every panelist  had his way of addressing the ambiguity about AI whether it enhances our jobs or over takes our Jobs.

It was great discussion hosted by Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV with  panel members Raghu Boddu, CISA, CFE, CDPSE Immanuel Kolagani Gupta Kandula

Pleasure is mine Sharing the stage with co speakers Koundinya Karanam  Dileep Kumar Saketi

Special thanks to Ruthvik Chowdary Poonam Goje Singh Dr. Mahesh Kumar CV for flawless event, your efforts are evident. 

#SAPCommunity #SITHyd

entry.title: SAP CHOTA TALKS Q1 - HYDERABAD - JUST THE BEGINNING!!
entry.content:
On February 22, 2025, the School of Management Studies at the University of Hyderabad hosted an outstanding SAP Chota Talks event. The gathering was a platform for enriching knowledge sharing, fostering community interaction, and sparking engaging discussions about the ever-changing SAP ecosystem.

The event featured insightful speaker sessions, an engaging panel discussion, and a deep dive into the impact of AI within the SAP ecosystem. These sessions provided valuable perspectives on how AI is shaping the future of SAP, sparking meaningful conversations about its potential and challenges.

It served as a wonderful platform for SAP professionals to meet, share experiences, and forge new connections. The event created a dynamic environment for networking, allowing attendees to engage with peers, exchange ideas, and build relationships that will support their growth.

@MaheshCV @Ruthvik_Chowdary Heartfelt thank you for organizing the event. Blog SAP CHOTA TALKS Hyderabad 2025 (Q1) - Event Highlights provides a thorough overview of the sessions, panel discussions, and the valuable knowledge shared during the event, offering a great resource for all those who attended and even those who couldn’t make it. We are excited and eager to see many more events like SAP Chota Talks, where knowledge is shared, connections are made, and innovation thrives.

entry.title: Re: Stopping blank reports from publications in SAP Analy...
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately there is no out-of the box solution to this scenario. but there is a workarounds you can apply.

Workaround :

1. Create a Restricted Measure: Create a restricted measure that filters only when COUNT([QuoteID]) > 0.
2. Set Story Filter: Apply a filter at the story level that only includes users where the count is greater than 0.
3. Publication Will Skip Empty Reports: Since SAC Publications only distribute content based on the existing filter,sellers with no quotes will be excluded from the burst.

Thanks with regards

Giri

I'm thinking in something like LI13N where you can see who must perform the inventory.

 

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Re: "This message is from an external sender" creates fol...
entry.content:
If you don't have any problems with manually sent emails, check the headers of the automatic emails, such as the sender and subject. Does it look like spam?

  • Why Are My Emails Going to Spam

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 6: SAP BTP Global Account & Subaccounts
entry.content:
This episode discusses the concept of global accounts and sub-accounts within the Business Technology Platform. It discusses how a global account serves as a central hub for managing resources, entitlements, and licenses, while sub-accounts act as subdivisions for organizing services, applications, and resources.

Takeaways

  • A global account is the top-level entity in the business technology platform, ideally having one per company per contract.
    • SAP Cloud Alm is an exception, delivered in a separate global account.
  • If there are multiple global accounts by mistake, SAP can help centralize them back into one global account.
  • Global accounts enable centralized management of costs, sub-accounts, resources, landscapes, licenses, and entitlements.
  • Boosters are prepackaged installations available only at the global account level for certain installations, such as product Document Reporting & Compliance (used for Peppol and E-document handling).
  • Sub-accounts exist within a global account and serve as subdivisions for organizing resources, applications, and services.
  • The global account manages overall entitlements, which can be distributed across sub-accounts by an administrator.
  • Sub-accounts provide logical separation for different purposes, like development, testing, production, regions, or specific projects.
  • Administrators can assign varying entitlements to sub-accounts, depending on the needs of different services or teams.

is it possible to add new field on standard tab or new custom Tab?

entry.title: Send data from Signavio Process intelligence to SAP analytic cloud

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors API language
entry.content:
Hi @shatsijev ,

normally you can look in the Data Dictionary in SuccessFactors to see if there is such a property:

If I understand correctly you are querying the country object? The country object should have depending on what languages you activated in your instance have properties reflecting the language.

For example there is an:
'externalName_defaultValue'

and for each language something like this:
'externalName_en_US'

Also there is something like this:
'externalName_localized'

While localized works like you described, giving back the language of the user, you should try the specific language property and see if it is what you are looking for.

Hope this helps

Kind regards
Alexander

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Derivation of System ID from Application Server Directory (AL11)
entry.content:
Did you do a Threat Modelling Workshop for that?
The whole process is not clear to me.
Placing files on OS and also executing scripts (maybe from uploaded files?) looks risky to me. Some questions coming to my mind right now: Who can upload files? How do you protect the path? Who can execute scripts? Who delivers scripts? Why is it on OS level?

entry.title: Re: Cloud Integration – Use Poll-Enrich with SFTP Adapter
entry.content:
Hi @AnujaSH ,

You will have add a router condition to handle this case.

You can use below condition:

${property.CamelLoopIndex} = '0' and ${property.SAP_PollEnrichMessageFound} = 'false'

This condition is basically checking if it is the first loop and no file is found.

 

Thanks,

Ankita

entry.title: How to handle errors for semantic key with number range in RAP?
entry.content:
Following scenario:

Managed RAP BO wit draft with managed numbering and UUID as key. In addition a semantic key should be generated by the system as a non-key field using a number range object. How do you do this correctly?

I tried using a determination on save and using number_get_next there. That works usually, but:

  • In case of errors you can only report a warning in a determination using reported as there is no failed which the user can chose to ignore. According to the documentation (https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/determination-and-validation-modelling#failed-entries-from-determinations) you should store the error somewhere in a buffer and check for it in a validation.
  • While that does work, in case of an error the save is blocked but also the number from the number range has still been picked since the LUW used in the determination is not rolled back? This results in a number gap.

I had a look at late unmanaged numbering but that only seems to be usable for the key field which in my case should still be managed numbering with UUID.

Is this scenario not covered or am I missing something?

entry.title: What's new in FP03 of Transportation Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023
entry.content:
We are proud to announce that today we have released Feature Package FP03 for S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023. This brings many new innovations for Transportation Management.

In this article I will talk about the most important innovations in TM.

First, let us take a look at the

AI Enhancements.

As you may already know from the announcements made for FPS02, we have made significant investments in AI-based features. With this feature package, we are now enhancing AI-based goods receipt analysis.
AI-assisted Goods Receipt Analysis also supports Shipment Documents with multiple deliveries and nested hierarchy structures.

Extraction of data from the shipping document

This means that you can now scan the shipping documents that accompany truck deliveries, analyze the documents, compare them to data already in your system, and create consignment orders with that data. This new feature detects multiple deliveries as well as deep packaging hierarchies.
If there is a mismatch, it is automatically detected and you can respond with error handling to correct the erroneous data in your consignment document.

Innovations for Advanced Shipping and Receiving

In the area of Adv. S&R we have three new innovations. The most important of them is:

GTS-Integration in Decentral TM/EWM for Advanced Shipping and Receiving

In a system landscape where the Advanced Shipping and Receiving Process is performed in a decentralized TM/EWM environment, SAP Global Trade Services can now be integrated for the export scenario. In this process, the compliance check in GTS can be triggered based on the freight unit or freight order. This can be done manually or the process can be fully automated.

Architectural Overview of GTS-Integration in Decentral TM/EWM & Process Flow

In addition, after loading in EWM, the export declaration can be triggered in GTS. The creation of the customs invoice can be included in this process with a completely new message choreography.

 

The second topic in the context of Adv. S&R is the weight/volume update of outbound delivery order items for unpacked products. With this enhancement, it is now possible to update the weight and volume information of unpacked products, such as bulk products that are weighted in EWM, and send it to TM.

Last but not least in the context of Adv. S&R is the ability to synchronize predecessor documents for Rail Freight Orders. With this enhancement, it's possible to directly update predecessor documents such as the freight unit or inbound delivery with different quantities (more or less of a product quantity or packages).

 

Further Enhancements in the Freight Document Execution

Further enhancements are available for multimodal processes in the air and in the ocean,

  • Automatically Set CU to Loaded on a Road Freight Order. This process enhancement makes it possible to automatically set a container unit to loaded at the latest when the truck is checked out at the loading location. This reduces the number of manual steps required.
  • Unassign, assign a container unit of a pick-up freight orders & Improved display of handling execution status in the overview tab for freight bookings. To further simplify document handling in multi-modal scenarios, new actions have been introduced. These new actions make assigning and unassigning container units to pick-up freight orders more efficient. New actions for deleting containers in a freight order are also available.
  • There is also an enhancement available in the TORGenericRequest_In service. With this enhancement, the carrier can now update header changes as well as actual departure dates/times.


Planning & Network Enhancements

A solution that many of you may have been waiting for is a new, innovative, and straightforward way to determine the carrier in a freight unit, consignment order, or freight order. This innovation greatly simplifies the carrier determination process by allowing a simple set of rules to be defined to find the right carrier. To do this, a new carrier determination profile has been introduced where simple criteria such as source and destination locations can be used to select the carrier. This new profile can be integrated with Excel for easier maintenance and a simulation report is also available.

The new profile can be assigned to order types.

Carrier determination in a freight order

This new feature is processed, for example, when a freight unit is created or data is changed. Or when a user manually creates a freight order, for example with the function 'Create Capacity Document based on groups'.

The carrier can be inherited from the previous document, or it can be created from scratch if the previous documents do not contain a carrier. Along with this new feature, mass change capabilities for the carrier are also introduced in the Transportation Cockpit. I think this really a awesome new feature.

 

There are also several other enhancements in Planning & Network. I'll mention just a few of them here.
Consideration of split breaks: A nice enhancement to driver time constraints is a topic that is defined in the EU driver regulations. According to these rules, breaks can be further split.

Another helpful feature introduced in embedded scheduling is that it avoids short loading or driving times before calendar breaks like weekends or non-working days.

Avoidance of activities prior to non-working days


These enhancements allow for more compact scheduling results and improved resource and driver utilization.

 

With this feature package, we are also improving the manual load planning capabilities. Specifically for 3D load planning, a new toolbar configuration is introduced that allows you to define which manual load planning actions should be displayed. Manual planning is also further supported with additional usability features such as better item selection (e.g. select all of the same stack, ...) and better item positioning (e.g. align, swap, mirror, lift up&down, ...). This helps the planner to use 3D load planning more efficiently.

Customized Toolbar with new actions for manual planning in 3D load planning

 

Another important feature is that street-level routing on the map now takes into account the departure time of the document stage. This means that time is now used on the map for more accurate routing.

Not to forget the performance improvements for the VSR Optimizer. These performance improvements are significant and you can find more information in this blog.

 

There are also a number of enhancements in the area of

ERP document integration

Let us first talk about 3 smaller topics in this area:

There will be a report available to activate ERP documents (MM/SD/LE) for integration with TM. This report is very helpful when TM is used for the first time and existing documents need to be activated for TM integration. Instead of having to manually find and modify documents to make them relevant for TM integration, these documents can now be easily activated by a report.

Another useful feature is the switch for the integration of Purchase Scheduling Agreements (PSAs). Various reports can be used to stop the integration of PSAs, deactivate or reactivate documents and, for example, trigger or deactivate nJIT SPCs.

Very often it is necessary to check if the components of a component group are dangerous goods. Therefore, a DG check on component group level is required. To achieve this, a new BAdI is introduced to pass the component for a classic Dangerous Goods check (PS&S). If the check for any component is positive, the component group header is marked as dangerous goods.

Integration of nJIT S2C Outbound Deliveries in TM

As with the integration of nJIT for inbound deliveries in FP2, we now offer the integration of nJIT for outbound deliveries. As in the inbound case, the logistically relevant product is the component group material. This means that the freight unit in TM is created at the component group level. The Advanced Shipping Notification can be sent with additional information such as slot number and JIT call reference.

Integration of nJIT Outbound delivery to TM

 

With FP02, we have introduced functionality in Freight Unit Building and Planning based on any unit of measure. Charging and settlement now also support any UoM at the product level.
This means that scale bases, calculation bases, rate tables, and agreements can now work with dimensionless units such as meters or pieces.

 Usage of any Unit of Measurement in charge calculation

 

 

This was the latest and greatest of Transportation Management in S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2023 FP03. 

S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition 2025 is already in the works. You can be curious about what will be delivered later this year. You can always get a preview of what is planned in the Roadmap Explorer.

Further information can be found here:

  • What’s New Viewer
  • SAP TM Product Page on sap.com
  • SAP Community for Transportation Management
  • SAP Transportation Management Group on LinkedIn
